steps.title: Use the isolation contrast
steps.content: The passage says Ibn Rushd's works were geographically far from the center of Islamic thought, but recent scholarship has undermined a claim about those works. The blank should express the rejected idea that his works did not matter to other philosophers.

steps.title: Choose the impact word
steps.content: Choice A concerns controversy, not influence. Choice B concerns hostility. Choice C concerns imitation, not significance. Choice D means unimportant to, which makes the scholarly correction meaningful despite Ibn Rushd's location. The answer is D.
